pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the waning strength of my very soul. He is gone, and with him, the last shred of meaning this hollow world offered me. Everything feels so heavy... so terribly dark. I look at the shadows stretching across the floor and I find myself longing to simply join them. To become part of that velvet silence, where the pain can't touch me anymore. It feels like the only way to truly find peace.
